name: Chicken-Pasta Salad with Roasted Red Pepper D
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing by combining all ingredients in a blender or food processor container and processing until nearly smooth. Chill for up to one day.
2. Cook pasta according to package directions, then drain and rinse under cold running water. Allow to cool for 5 to 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, diced chicken, and dressing. Toss gently to coat.
4. Garnish with halved cherry tomatoes and fresh basil or parsley.
5. Refrigerate until serving time. Serve at room temperature or slightly chilled in a lettuce-lined dish.
